stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
According to NOTAM A7408/14, the approach frequency for…

options.a: LIRA airport has changed permanently to 131.250 MHz.
options.b: LIRA airport has changed permanently to 134.200 MHz.
options.c: PERM airport has changed to 134.200 MHz.
options.d: PERM airport has changed to 131.250 MHz.
